page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical AMD EPYC 9T24 cores running at 2.7 GHz, with one thread per core. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core tests placing in the top 25% at 3074.67. Multi-core CPU performance falls in the middle 50% average range at 12302.19. Memory bandwidth tests show a clear performance tradeoff: while small-block cached read-only bandwidth is average at 607.06 GB/sec, large-block uncached read-only memory bandwidth is weak, scoring in the bottom 25% at 38.79 GB/sec. Single-threaded gzip compression and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression both perform in the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offer a stable resource profile for general-purpose workloads without the premium of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. However, the lack of local storage requires external block storage, which should be factored into architectural planning. This instance is appropriate for web serving, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and general-purpose application hosting that does not require high uncached memory bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 server provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 25%, while multi-core performance and cached memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. A key tradeoff is its weak uncached large-block read memory bandwidth, which falls into the bottom 25%. With a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps, this instance is designed for workloads such as web serving, application hosting, and moderate computational tasks that do not depend on high-speed local storage or intensive uncached memory access.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge features 8 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 32 GB RAM, offering strong single-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC processor instance with a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio, delivering strong single-core performance for general-purpose computing.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 25%
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No local storage or GPU hardware included
Suitable for web serving, application hosting, and general-purpose workloads
